## Delivered

- **Constitutional Enforcement Gates (Art. II–VII)**
  - Agent Authority (Art. II) — `enforce-agent-authority.cjs` + `enforce-git-push-authority.cjs`
  - Story-Driven (Art. III) — `enforce-story-driven.cjs`
  - No Invention (Art. IV) — `enforce-no-invention.cjs`
  - Quality First (Art. V) — `enforce-quality-gates.cjs`
  - Framework Boundary (Art. VI–VII) — `.claude/settings.json` deny rules + `enforce-quality-gates.cjs`

- **Hook Infrastructure**
  - 24 active hooks registered in `.claude/settings.json`
  - Gate logging infrastructure (`.aiox/gate-logs/`)
  - Metrics tracking (`.synapse/metrics/hook-metrics.json`)

- **SYNAPSE Integration Layer**
  - `synapse-engine.cjs` — context injection
  - `synapse-wrapper.cjs` — process isolation
  - `prompt-router.cjs` — routing logic
  - Agent activation tracker (`agent-activation-tracker.cjs`)

- **Architecture Documentation**
  - `.claude/CLAUDE.md` (Synkra AIOX rules)
  - `.claude/rules/` (16 rule files, all active)
  - `.aiox-core/constitution.md` (Articles I–VII)

---

## Key Decisions

- **CLI First (Art. I):** All enforcement happens at CLI layer via hooks — no UI-level gates needed.
- **Agent Authority (Art. II):** Exclusive `@devops` for git push/PR/release — enforced via `PreToolUse` hooks blocking non-@devops agents.
- **Gate Logging:** Every constitutional gate decision logged to `.aiox/gate-logs/{article}-{date}.jsonl` (JSONL format, one decision per line).
- **Metrics:** Centralized in `.synapse/metrics/hook-metrics.json` — gates enforcement, violations, overrides tracked per session.

---

## Blockers Resolved (by end of Phase 1)

- SYNAPSE activation blocker (Session 2026-06-08) — agent-activation-tracker.cjs hook created + tested.
- Framework boundary enforcement — `.claude/settings.json` deny rules applied to L1/L2 paths.
- Story-driven enforcement gap — `enforce-story-driven.cjs` hooked into `PreToolUse(git commit)`.
